title: primula sutchuenensis
intro: Primula sutchuenensis, also known as Sichuan primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Primula sutchuenensis are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
